title: [Black Swan Castle, Courtyard]
description: From this angle, the haze surrounding the keep to the northeast seems to take on the ever-cycling hues of the rainbow.  No longer merely a black, lifeless interloper against the sky, the stronghold now seems to pulsate with secret malevolent life.  Although no wind can penetrate the surrounding walls, a low, constant rustling sound can be perceived, like the beating of giant wings.
